false_positive_if_missing: V1/V2 or USDC.e/pUSD objects treated as fungible
fail_closed_rule: reject if any generation is unknown or mismatched

required_fields: sport, competition, participants, participant roles, scheduled_start, provider event ids, game/series number, venue/neutral-site
false_positive_if_missing: reschedules, doubleheaders, same-day rematches or similarly named teams merged
fail_closed_rule: require stable IDs or reviewed mapping; fuzzy match may only nominate candidates

required_fields: moneyline/1x2/spread/total/prop, period, line, side, market type id
false_positive_if_missing: full-game, period, alternate line or prop exposures compared

required_fields: regulation, overtime, extra innings, shootout, abandoned-game treatment
false_positive_if_missing: two apparently opposite legs can both lose or both void

required_fields: listed pitcher, goalie, lineup, tennis retirement/walkover, substitution rules
false_positive_if_missing: settlement differs after player change or retirement

required_fields: oracle/result source, finality, dispute window, correction policy
false_positive_if_missing: venues settle from different facts or at different finality points

required_fields: terminal scenario id and per-leg payoff vector
false_positive_if_missing: nominal labels look exhaustive but leave draw/push/void/cancel scenarios uncovered
fail_closed_rule: matrix rank/coverage check across all terminal scenarios

required_fields: collateral, decimals, conversion haircut, gas, bridge/withdrawal cost, commission/fee function
false_positive_if_missing: gross odds imply profit while net cash flow is negative
fail_closed_rule: cash flows in one accounting currency after conservative costs
